title: Module 1
content:
Introduction: Evolution of FMS, Basic Components of FMS, Types of
FMS Layouts, -Inline layout, loop layout, loader layout, open field layout,
robot configured layout, general FMS considerations, functions of FMS,
FMS Justification, Cell/FMS Justification Flow chart.

title: Module 2
content:
Manufacturing cells: Introduction, Classification of manufacturing Cells-
FMS Unattended Machining- Features and Requirement, Toyota
Production System (TPS), Group technology- Part Classification and
Coding, Production Flow Analysis. Machining Center- Types, Axes and
Format Information, Automated Features and Capabilities of Machining
Center, Cellular Vs Flexible manufacturing.

title: Module 3
content:
Computer aided programme generation & Product Manufacturing,
Automated Material Movement and Storage System- Automated Storage
and Retrieval Systems (AS/RS), Industrial Robots, Cutting Tools and Tool
Management- Tool Preset, Identification and Data Transfer.

title: Module 4
content:
FMS Planning: CAD Considerations FMS planning, CAM Considerations
for FMS planning. FMS Software Structure- General Structure and
Requirements, Types of FMS Software Modules, FMS installation and
implementation- System Installation, acceptance testing.
